# Infinity Gaming (Bhopal)
Infinity Gaming is a premier gaming zone located in MP Nagar Zone 1, Bhopal.

## Location & Contact
- **Address:** R 1, SBI Colony, Under IDBI Bank, MP Nagar Zone 1, Bhopal, MP 462023
- **Status:** Open 24/7

## Services (High-Margin)
- **VIP Lounge:** High-spec RTX Gaming PCs with ergonomic setups.
- **Console Zone:** PS5 and Xbox gaming areas.
- **Tournaments:** Regular local eSports events and team bookings.

## Tech Specs
- High-speed fiber internet (low ping for competitive play).
- RTX-powered graphics for AAA titles.
- Professional mechanical peripherals.
